title: Advanced Explosives Handbook
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Deeply_Religious.jpg|thumb|250px]]
'''''Advanced Explosives Handbook''''' was an [[album]] by [[Deeply Religious]]. It was banned by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].

==Track listing==
*"[[Having Fun with Detonite]]"
*"[[Heavy Blaster Blues]]"
*"[[How Do They See Anyway? (Stormtrooper's Dilemma)]]"
*"[[How to Get Banned (Have a Mind)]]"
*"[[Rotten to the Core (Empire's Crumbling)]]"
*"[[So Much for Tact]]"
*"[[Where is Everyone?]]"
